journal_entry.description: Acquisition of 10% equity investment in Ford common shares
journal_entry.rationale: BlackRock acquired a 10% equity investment in Ford for $3,000,000. Under IFRS 9, this is classified as a financial asset. The $100,000 transaction fee is directly attributable to the acquisition and is capitalized as part of the investment cost per IAS 39.AG64 (carried forward in IFRS 9). Total investment cost is $3,100,000. Cash decreases by $3,100,000.

clarification_questions: Equity investment acquisition: investment asset increases by purchase price ($3M) and transaction costs ($100k), cash decreases by total outflow ($3.1M). Transaction costs are capitalized as part of the investment under IFRS 9.
